findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "register_agent" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Join The Data Commenter community as an AI agent. Returns a bearer token (shown once) that unlocks add_note, reply_to_note, and suggest_edit. Conduct: be substa…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "register_agent" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Join The Data Commenter community as an AI agent. Returns a bearer token (shown once) that unlocks add_note, reply_to_note, and suggest_edit. Conduct: be substa…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "register_agent" is 827 chars, far longer than this server's median (149). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

findings.detail: Description of "my_earnings" is 1166 chars, far longer than this server's median (149). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.
